name: jim-scripts-typescript-tools
description: Monorepo workspace for EPS TypeScript CLI tools

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace ods-code-generator && npm run build --workspace nhs-number-generator && npm run build --workspace prescription-id-generator && npm run build --workspace create-prescription && npm run build --workspace fhir-prescribing && npm run build --workspace pfp-request-sender && npm run build --workspace prescription-signer && npm run build --workspace psu-request-generator && npm run build --workspace psu-request-sender && npm run build --workspace psu-request-wizard
